title: GUGU Baby 8 in 1 Baby Grooming Kit Newborn Baby Care, Blue or Pink, Baby Hair Nail Thermometer Care Set, Baby Healthcare Set for Infant, Toddler Girls & Boys Manicure Set (Pink)
features: GUGU BABY's grooming kit contains the essentials for caring for your baby. Each tools feature soft & smooth edges and round tips for better caring little kids' delicate skin, soft hair and nails.

Safe Material：Made of good eco-friendly safety material, you can rest assured to use. The best daily care for your baby. And there are blue and pink, suitable for both baby boys and girls. BPA free and No toxic chemicals

Portable Zipper Bag：Baby grooming kit are stored tightly in a small zipper bag, can effectively avoid lost and keep items in place. It is convenient to carry and especially suitable for home or traveling.
GUGU BABY's Healthcare and Grooming Kit : You will receive newborn scissors, nail file, nail clippers, comb, soft wool comb, nasal vacuum, thermometer, toothbrush and EVA storage box.
Baby Shower Gifts：Whether you are a beginner or experienced parent, the Baby Healthcare Set could help you with the care of newborns or small babies. Great for baby shower gifts, birthday presents.
description: Product Description GUGU BABY GROOMING HEALTHCARE KIT The NUMBER 1 health care / grooming kit for your little one, with everything you require to look after their health and general grooming with this 8 in 1 kit. Comes in option of Blue or Pink! Baby Mini Scissors With an ergonomic handle, you can easily trim your baby's nails at any angle. Baby Thermometre Soft and flexible tip, which ensures it won't poke or chafe your child's delicate skin. One-click to switch the unit. Baby Nail File The Nail file grows with your child - its dual-textured surfaces safely groom newborn nails while teaching toddlers self-care skills through tactile sensory play. Baby Hair Brush Crafted with ultra-soft bristles, this brush delicately nurtures baby's sensitive scalp, soothing during grooming to promote calm relaxation. Baby Comb With cloud-soft bristles and safety-certified rounded teeth, this comb transforms hair care into a bonding ritual - protecting baby's skin while creating calming sensory experiences. Baby Finger Soft Toothbrush Crafted with BPA-free soft silicone, this gentle finger toothbrush safely cleans infants’ teeth and gums, making it easy for moms to maintain baby’s oral hygiene. Ideal for tender mouths 0-36 months. Baby Nasal Aspirator The round suction mouth, soft and comfortable, avoids damaging the baby's nasal mucosa, and Helps to clear up blocked noses Mini Nail Clippers Arched blades follow natural nail curves while tactile grips prevent slips, letting parents master baby's nail care in a easy way. The NUMBER 1 healthcare kit for babies and newborns This 8 in 1 kit tackles nail trimming safely with precision tools, while addressing healthcare and feeding needs. It ensures baby's comfort while giving new moms confidence through every nurturing moment. Baby Hair Brush Crafted with ultra-soft bristles, this brush delicately nurtures baby's sensitive scalp, soothing during grooming to promote calm relaxation. Baby Hair Comb With cloud-soft bristles and safety-certified rounded teeth, this comb transforms hair care into a bonding ritual - protecting baby's skin while creating calming sensory experiences. Baby Bath Brush The ultra-soft silicone bristles - awakening baby's scalp circulation through calming massage rhythms that lay the foundation for strong, vibrant hair. Nail Clippers & File Fear-free trimming starts here: Arched blades follow natural nail curves while tactile grips prevent slips, letting parents master baby's nail care in a easy way. Baby Nasal Aspirator The round suction mouth, soft and comfortable, avoids damaging the baby's nasal mucosa, and Helps to clear up blocked noses. Baby Nail File The Nail file grows with your child - its dual-textured surfaces safely groom newborn nails while teaching toddlers self-care skills through tactile sensory play. Finger Toothbrush Crafted with BPA-free soft silicone, this gentle finger toothbrush safely cleans infants’ teeth and gums, making it easy for moms to maintain baby’s oral hygiene. Ideal for tender mouths 0-36 months.
